login.title: TentaFlow
login.subtitle: Router Dashboard
login.error_session_expired: Session expired - please log in again

home.title: TentaFlow Dashboard
home.subtitle: Admin overview · local mesh status · recent activity
home.stat_models_empty_hint: Configure a model in Models section

services_list.title: Services
services_list.empty_hint: Add services in the Services tab

services.title: Services
services.empty_hint: Deploy an engine from the catalog to start your first AI service
services.delete_confirm_body: The service will be stopped and removed from the registry. Docker container or native process must be stopped separately if not managed by TentaFlow.
services.tooltip_pin_on: Always kept in memory — click to disable
services.aliases_info_body: Names used by clients (e.g. llm-fast) → router resolves to primary target + fallback chain.
services.aliases_empty_hint: Aliases let clients use stable names; router maps them to actual models per strategy.
services.alias_fallback_parse_failed: Could not read existing fallbacks (invalid format). Refresh the page or re-add fallbacks before saving.
services.alias_fallback_hint: List of models/aliases routing will fall back to when primary target is unavailable. Priority left-to-right.
services.models_empty_hint: Models will appear here automatically when you deploy engines from the catalog.
services.update_active_sessions_warning: {count} active meeting sessions will be terminated.
services.update_unsupported: This engine does not support in-place updates.
services.update_no_source: No source tree is available for this deployment.
services.update_timeout: Update timed out. The backend did not respond within 5 minutes.

deploy.title: Deploy new service
deploy.node_hint: On which mesh node to pull and run
deploy.error_no_engines: No engines in catalog — check manifest in tentaflow-containers/
deploy.error_no_models: No models — configure in Models section

form.type_hint: Choose the API domain this service exposes
form.name_hint: Name under which the router resolves the service
form.target_hint: Locally or on another mesh node

apikeys.title: API Keys
apikeys.empty_hint: Click "Generate key" to create a new one
apikeys.key_result_label: Generated key (copy it - it won't be visible again)
apikeys.copy_hint: Copy the key — it will only be visible now!

settings.title: Settings
settings.general_hint: Raw key–value pairs from DB. Changes apply immediately. Special sections (TLS, NGC, OAuth) are handled in dedicated tabs.
settings.sso_hint: Sign-in via an external OIDC provider (Azure AD, Google, ADFS, Authentik, generic OIDC).
settings.sso_discovery_url_hint: Base OIDC provider URL. /.well-known/openid-configuration is appended automatically.
settings.sso_auto_create_hint: When enabled, new SSO users are created on first login.
settings.sso_default_group_hint: Optional — group ID to assign to newly created users.
settings.sso_add_required: Fill in all required fields (name, client ID, client secret, discovery URL)
settings.oauth_hint: Public URL of the TentaFlow server as seen from the browser. Used as redirect_uri in OAuth/SSO flow. Defaults to localhost — change it if the server is accessible from the internet.
settings.oauth_url_invalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
settings.tls_save_required: Provide both certificate and private key in PEM format
settings.ngc_hint: Required to pull NVIDIA NIM containers. Get your key at build.nvidia.com.

speakers.title: Speaker Recognition
speakers.conf_high_hint: Confidence threshold above which the speaker is recognized with high confidence
speakers.conf_medium_hint: Confidence threshold above which the speaker is recognized with medium confidence
speakers.samples_required_hint: Minimum number of voice samples needed for speaker registration
speakers.enrollment_conf_hint: Minimum confidence required for automatic registration of a new speaker

tls.title: TLS Certificates
tls.subtitle: TLS certificates for QUIC server. Upload cert.pem and key.pem to automatically distribute them to agents.

settings.ngc_api_key_hint: Required for NVIDIA NIM container catalog. Get your key at build.nvidia.com
settings.oauth_redirect_hint: URL of this server as seen from the browser. Default localhost, change to public address if accessible from internet.

mesh.bind_mode_sub: Where iroh opens the UDP socket listening for mesh connections.
mesh.bind_mode_auto_desc: Bind 0.0.0.0:0. iroh listens on all interfaces and advertises every address. Works on single-NIC hosts; on multi-NIC it causes slow connections.
mesh.bind_mode_custom_desc: Pin bind to the IP selected in the table below. iroh listens on that single socket only and does not advertise addresses from other interfaces.
mesh.interfaces_sub: Pick the main interface (radio) and decide which addresses are advertised to peers.
mesh.advertise_preview_sub: Preview of the direct_addrs list propagated through the relay and stored under trusted_contact:*.
mesh.filters_sub: Automatic exclusions applied regardless of the row-level toggles above.
mesh.filter_prefer_subnet: Prefer path in the same subnet
mesh.relay_sub: Intermediate server used when direct p2p fails (NAT traversal). DB key: settings.mesh.iroh_relay_url.
mesh.relay_hint: Defaults to https://relay.nextapp.pl (self-hosted iroh-relay). You can enter your own URL — http/https schemes only.
mesh.save_custom_no_ip: Pick an interface (radio in the table) when bind mode = custom
mesh.banner_multi_nic: Active interfaces detected: {names}. Recommended: switch to custom mode and pin the main interface to avoid 10-16 s stalls on unreachable paths.
mesh.restart_required: Restart the application so the new bind / relay takes effect.

catalog.title: Service Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Services and infrastructure from TOML manifests · deploy in 3 steps
catalog.noCompatible: No engines compatible with this system
catalog.select_target_hint: Catalog will show engines compatible with the selected target's OS and hardware
catalog.no_targets_hint: Pair at least one mesh node or create a cluster
catalog.cluster_not_supported: Cluster deployment requires selecting a specific node
catalog.cluster_nim_not_supported: NVIDIA NIM requires a specific node target (not a cluster)
catalog.empty_hint: Integration with NVIDIA NIM catalog coming soon. Models optimized for NVIDIA GPUs.

tts.name: Text to Speech
tts.desc: Speech synthesis from text. Multiple languages and voices support.

stt.name: Speech to Text
stt.desc: Speech recognition. Audio transcription to text.

reranker.name: Reranker
reranker.desc: Search results reranking. Cross-encoder for precise document scoring.

tools.name: Tools
tools.desc: AI Tools server. Integration with external APIs and functions.

memory.name: Memory
memory.desc: AI Context Memory. Conversation storage and retrieval.

comfyui.name: Image Generation
comfyui.desc: Image generation and editing via ComfyUI. Stable Diffusion.

meeting-bot.name: Meeting Bot
meeting-bot.desc: AI bot for Teams meetings — joins as participant, transcribes, responds.

tentaflow.name: TentaFlow
tentaflow.desc: TentaFlow Platform - DCIM, workflow, documents, tickets.

llm.name: LLM Server
llm.desc: Large Language Model server. SGLang, vLLM, Ollama, LLama.cpp.

deploy_modal.config_path_hint: Path to config.toml file on host
deploy_modal.yaml_hint: You can edit content before deployment

llm_wizard.title: Deploy LLM
llm_wizard.container_hint: Unique Docker container and stack name
llm_wizard.hf_warning: HuggingFace token missing in settings. Some models may require authentication.

engines.sglang: High-performance LLM server with SGL. Multi-GPU, FP8, PagedAttention support.
engines.vllm: Popular LLM server. Tensor parallelism, continuous batching.
engines.ollama: Easy to use. Local models, REST API, simple installation.
engines.llamacpp: Lightweight, CPU+GPU. GGUF formats, low requirements.

advanced.title: Advanced configuration
advanced.subtitle: The smart VRAM calculator picks tensor parallel, context, and KV cache for your GPU. Leave it auto-tuned or switch to manual.
advanced.loading_config: Fetching model config.json from HuggingFace and computing VRAM…
advanced.reset_lock_title: Unlock all parameters — let the backend auto-fit
advanced.error_no_fit: Configuration does not fit in VRAM.
advanced.error_hint: Click Reset to auto or lower the locked parameter.
advanced.auto_default_hint: Auto-tuned will use the default vLLM configuration once the recommendation arrives.
advanced.rec_summary: TP={tp} × PP={pp}, context {ctx}, KV cache {dtype}, max_num_seqs={seqs}, gpu_memory_utilization={mu}.
advanced.compat_warn_title: GPU count is suboptimal for this model.
advanced.compat_better: Go back to the GPU step and pick: {options}
advanced.compat_idle: TP={tp} × PP={pp} = {used} GPU in use. The rest are idle. Better use: {options}.
advanced.ctx_hint_max_with_vram: Max from model config: {model} · from VRAM: {vram}.
advanced.mem_hint: Percent of VRAM for vLLM, the rest is CUDA workspace.
advanced.kv_hint: fp8 is half the VRAM cost while preserving quality.
advanced.vllm_args_note: Values are saved as VLLM_ARGS at deploy. Sliders don't enforce hard limits — try extreme values; the calculator above flags when it does not fit.
advanced.live_kv_estimate: Estimated KV cache (live): {gb} GB · backend will confirm shortly…
advanced.lock_title: This parameter is locked — other sliders auto-adjust

flows_config.advanced_raw_hint: Direct JSON editing. Invalid JSON is ignored until fixed.

node_descriptions.tts_clean: Text cleaning for TTS - replaces abbreviations (uses TTS Rules)

flows.subtitle: DAG graph executed by flow_engine — LLM, embeddings, TTS.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: {total} events · filter by type · CSV export
audit.cleanup_prompt: Delete entries older than how many days?
audit.cleanup_confirm_msg: Delete audit entries older than {days} days? This cannot be undone.

mesh.title: Mesh
mesh.unpair_confirm: Are you sure you want to unpair this host? It will be removed from all nodes in the mesh.
mesh.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke trust for this node?
mesh.revoke_dialog_lead: This node will be removed from paired nodes. The mesh session will be disconnected immediately and its public key will be cleared from this device.
mesh.revoke_dialog_cons_disconnect: The mesh session will be terminated immediately.
mesh.revoke_dialog_cons_key: The peer's public key will be removed from this device.
mesh.revoke_dialog_cons_pair_again: To reconnect, you will need to pair again (QR or PIN).
mesh.pair_progress_banner_success_desc: QUIC mesh session is up — the remote node is now reachable.
mesh.pair_progress_banner_pending_desc: The remote node received the request. Confirm it on the other device to finish pairing.
mesh.pair_err_connect_timeout: Remote node didn't respond within 25s. Check that it's running and can reach the iroh relay.
mesh.pair_err_no_addressing: No address info for the remote node. Check internet connectivity or enter IP:port manually.
mesh.pair_err_stream_closed: Remote node closed the stream before replying. Try again.
mesh.pair_err_pin: PIN error — generate a new code on the remote node and retry.
mesh.pair_pin_hint: Enter the 6-digit PIN shown on the remote node
mesh.pair_pin_display_hint: Enter this PIN on the remote node to complete pairing
mesh.confirm_pin_hint: Enter the PIN displayed on the requesting node
mesh.network_timeout: Node did not respond — check if it is available
mesh.network_ip_changed_warning: IP changed. Node may be temporarily unavailable at the new address.
mesh.network_gateway_subnet: Gateway must be in the same subnet
mesh.discovered_hint: Advertises as TentaFlow · broadcasts Ed25519 public key · requires PIN to pair
mesh.pair_pin_display_title: Share PIN with the other node
mesh.pair_pin_display_intro: Enter this PIN on node {node}... to complete pairing.
mesh.pair_pin_display_steps:
1. Open the Mesh tab on the remote node
2. On the pending pairing card click "Confirm"
3. Enter this PIN and submit
4. Once verified both nodes trust each other
mesh.pair_invalid_socket: Address must include a valid host and port
mesh.diagram_hint: Click a node for details · solid line = direct · dashed = relay
mesh.pair_qr_hint: Scan this code with TentaFlow on another device — pairing happens automatically.
mesh.pair_id_hint: Use this when mDNS is blocked (different VLANs, firewall, WiFi client isolation). You can find the hex on the other node under Pair · Scan QR.
mesh.qr_scanner_hint: Point the camera at the QR code shown on the other device
mesh.qr_scan_invalid: This QR code is not a valid TentaFlow code
mesh.qr_scan_denied: Camera access denied. Check browser site permissions.
mesh.qr_scan_no_camera: No camera found on this device.
mesh.qr_scan_busy: Camera is in use by another application.
mesh.qr_scan_insecure: Scanning requires HTTPS. Open the app over https://
mesh.profile_unavailable: Profiling is not available on this node.

action.confirm_delete: Delete profiling session? This cannot be undone.

error.not_available: nsys is not available on this node

status.no_nvidia_tooltip: Profiling requires an NVIDIA GPU + Nsight Systems

install.title: Enable Nsight Systems profiling
install.description: To profile the NVIDIA GPU on this node, install Nsight Systems. It ships as part of the NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit or as a standalone package.
install.macos_unsupported: Apple Silicon does not support Nsight (no NVIDIA GPU)

launch.title: Start profiling session
launch.elevation_explain: Provide your sudo password once. It is used to spawn collectors and is {strong_never_stored}.
launch.elevation_never_stored: never stored on disk or in DB

sessions.title: Profiling sessions
sessions.empty_launch_first: Launch your first session to see results here.
sessions.compare_hint: Pick two completed sessions to compare side-by-side.
sessions.empty_sub: Launch your first multi-source profiling session to inspect CPU, GPU, memory and power together.
sessions.empty_filtered_sub: Try clearing the search or filter chips.
sessions.toast_no_sources: No profiling sources available on this node

report.err_missing_summary_intro: This session has no report saved on disk. Possible reasons:
report.err_missing_summary_in_progress: Session is still being collected (the report is created only after Stop)
report.err_missing_summary_killed: Tentaflow process was killed before completion (kill / OOM / restart)
report.err_missing_summary_stop_failed: Stop failed with an error (check tentaflow logs)
report.err_missing_summary_hidden: After pull and restart, this session will be automatically hidden from the list (storage_v2 list_sessions filters by summary.bin).
report.err_compare_two_required: Two session IDs are required for comparison
report.err_compare_v2_required: Compare requires both reports in V2 schema.
report.err_unknown_schema_v2: Backend returned a V2 envelope with schema_version={ver} which the dashboard does not understand. Update the web client.
report.err_unknown_schema: Unknown report format (schema_version={ver}). Check tentaflow versions.
report.kpi_disk_sub: Peak R · W {w} · p99 await {p99} ms
report.cpu_no_data: No CPU utilization data collected for this session.
report.cpu_pmu_no_data: PMU counters require perf stat. Add linux.perf.pmu_counters source (perf stat -e cycles,instructions,cache-misses,branch-misses) to capture IPC, L3 miss rate and branch miss rate.
report.cpu_top_symbols_no_data: Top symbols require perf record. Add linux.perf.cpu_sampling source (perf record -F 99 -g) to enable per-symbol hotspots and the flamegraph view.
report.cpu_hot_threads_no_data: Hot threads require perf record. Per-thread CPU breakdown is reconstructed from CPU sampling events.
report.gpu_no_data: No GPU data collected for this session.
report.gpu_intel_kernel_banner: Kernel-level metrics not available on this platform. Engine utilization captured via intel_gpu_top. Install Intel GPA or VTune Profiler for kernel traces.
report.gpu_apple_kernel_banner: Apple Silicon — utilization and power only. For kernel-level insight, capture a Metal trace via Xcode Instruments.
report.gpu_unified_mem_banner: Unified memory — see RAM tab for combined pressure.
report.gpu_transfer_apple: Unified memory architecture — no explicit host/device transfers on Apple Silicon. See RAM tab for combined memory pressure.
report.gpu_transfer_no_telemetry: Transfer telemetry not collected for this device.
report.gpu_transfer_no_window: No host-device transfers observed during this window.
report.gpu_apple_kernel_table_note: Per-kernel timings require Metal capture (Xcode Instruments).
report.gpu_intel_kernel_table_note: Per-kernel timings require Intel GPA / Level Zero tracer.
report.gpu_apple_api_placeholder: — Metal calls available only with Xcode Instruments trace
report.gpu_intel_api_note: Per-API timings require Intel GPA / Level Zero tracer.
report.gpu_aria_transfer_ts: GPU transfer time-series H2D D2H D2D
report.memory_no_data: No memory samples collected for this session.
report.memory_bw_no_data: RAM bandwidth not collected. Requires uncore counters (sudo + cap_perfmon) on x86, or Apple Silicon performance counters.
report.disk_io_no_window: No process IO during this session window.
report.power_no_samples: No power samples collected. Power telemetry requires RAPL (sudo / CAP_SYS_RAWIO on Linux), nvidia-smi, rocm-smi, or powermetrics (macOS, sudo). Re-run the session with elevated privileges.
report.power_total_h: Total power broken down per domain
report.power_rapl_unavailable: RAPL unavailable — CPU pkg / DRAM power missing. Showing GPU-only domains. Re-run with sudo for full breakdown.
report.sources_drift_bad: Exceeded tolerance — cross-source correlation unreliable; re-collect with NTP-synced clocks.
report.tab_pending_body: The module {path} is being implemented separately ({reason}). Other tabs of this report are fully functional.
report.no_cpu_samples_flame: No CPU samples. This report contains no events for flamegraph aggregation.
report.no_timeline_data: No timeline data. This report contains zero events.
report.finding_gpu_idle_title: GPU {id} idle {pct}% of session — possible CPU bottleneck
report.finding_gpu_idle_detail: {sym} ({pct}%) saturates host while GPU stream waits. Consider pipelining or moving hot path to GPU.
report.finding_disk_spike_detail: {val} burst — likely correlates with checkpoint save NVTX range.
report.finding_ram_bw_detail: Read+write peaked above 85% of the DDR5-6000 ceiling. Memory-bound kernels likely.
report.finding_cross_vendor_title: Cross-vendor dispatch is sequential, not concurrent
report.finding_cross_vendor_detail: GPU 0 ({va}) and GPU 1 ({vb}) appear to alternate rather than overlap. Parallelize via separate streams for potential speedup.

flame.panel_empty:
Click a frame to inspect.
Enter to drill down · Esc to reset
flame.no_samples_in_range: No CPU samples in this range.

timeline.hint_keys: F fit · ←/→ pan · +/- zoom · Esc clear
timeline.selection_empty: Drag with Shift to select a range — cross-source stats will appear here.

compare.title: Compare sessions
compare.diff_no_data: No CPU sample data available in either session.

permissions.title: Profile permissions
permissions.subtitle: Per-tab settings — sudo password lives in memory only and is cleared when the tab is closed.
permissions.remember_sudo_desc: Cache password in memory (never on disk) until tentaflow process exits. Convenient for back-to-back captures.
permissions.auto_elevate_desc: Automatically prompt for sudo when starting any profile session that requires it.
permissions.security_warning: Security warning: caching sudo credentials grants the tentaflow process the ability to spawn privileged collectors without re-authentication. Disable this toggle on shared workstations.
permissions.sudo_password_desc: Used by collectors that require root (RAPL, kernel tracing).
permissions.feedback_backend_unreachable: Backend unreachable via binary ValidateSudoRequest — password cached locally, validation will run on session start.
permissions.section_paths_sub: Auto-discovered from PATH. Override if you have a non-standard installation. Paths are stored locally per-browser.
permissions.section_sources_sub: Disabled sources are hidden from the launch modal on this browser. Backend capability detection still applies.
permissions.section_storage_sub: Backend does not yet expose limit-management API; settings live per-browser. Backend hardcoded: FIFO 20 sessions per node, max 600s duration, label ≤ 128 chars.
permissions.cap_per_session_desc: Maximum size of a single session. Sessions exceeding the cap are stopped and marked as truncated.
permissions.fifo_size_desc: Number of sessions kept on disk. The oldest is rotated when the limit is reached.
permissions.auto_delete_desc: Failed sessions are deleted after this many days.
permissions.feedback_limits_saved: Storage limits saved locally. Backend does not yet expose an API to change real policy — limits act as a hint for the GUI (FIFO 20, duration 600s are hardcoded in backend).

range.cpu_no_data: No CPU samples in this range.
range.kernels_no_data: No kernel data in this range.
range.nvtx_no_intersect: No NVTX ranges intersect this selection.

clusters.name: Cluster name
clusters.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete cluster "{name}"?
clusters.no_trusted_nodes: No trusted nodes available. Pair nodes in the Mesh tab first.
clusters.detection_partial: Partial connectivity: some nodes unreachable. Best link: {speed}
clusters.probing_subtitle: Probing bandwidth between {nodes} selected nodes... {done} of {total} pairs complete

cluster_detail.no_shared_models: No shared models in this cluster

users.perm_hint: Change this group permissions for resources. Auto = default access (allow), Zezwól = explicit allow, Odmów = explicit deny. Priority: User > Group > Default.
users.create_hint: User will receive an initial password. A change is required at first login.
users.status_active_desc: Active — can log in and use the app
users.status_disabled_desc: Disabled — exists but cannot log in

nim.no_api_key: NVIDIA NIM requires NGC API Key

nim.not_supported_hint: NVIDIA NIM containers require an NVIDIA GPU on the target node. Select a node with an NVIDIA GPU to deploy NIM containers.

pose.title: Pose
pose.subtitle: Live camera preview with local body skeleton overlay

meeting.title: Meeting Bot
meeting.url_hint: Paste the full Teams meeting URL. The bot will join as a participant.
meeting.vnc_hint: Opens a browser preview of the bot's Teams session via VNC. Use this for initial login and debugging.
meeting.no_transcripts: No transcripts yet — start talking in the meeting
meeting.enrolled_profile: Known voice profile — recognised from database
meeting.temp_speaker: Temporary speaker — not yet linked to a profile
meeting.subtitle: Bot joins Teams/Meet/Zoom meetings and runs a live transcript
meeting.join_sub: The bot joins the URL in listen-only mode and starts transcribing. Participants see it as a guest labelled AI transcription.
meeting.join_hint: Enter to join · bot starts in ~12-20s
meeting.live_footer: Listening · receiving QUIC stream from bot
meeting.step1_desc: teams-bot container launched with dynamic ports
meeting.step2_desc: Headless Chromium opens the meeting link
meeting.step3_desc: Bot is in the lobby — host sees the join request
meeting.step4_desc: Audio pipeline + diarization run once admitted
meeting.lifecycle_lobby_waiting: Waiting in lobby — host has to admit the bot
meeting.err_no_session: Backend did not return a session
meeting.err_lifecycle_timeout: Timeout: the bot did not join within 90s. Check container logs.
meeting.summary_pending_backend: Summary and action items will appear here once the bot finishes generating them (Stage 2.2).
meeting.history_empty_selection: Select a meeting from the list on the left
meeting.settings_sub: Per-user config — stored locally and synced via mesh
meeting.sett_identity_sub: What participants see when the bot joins.
meeting.sett_disclaimer_hint: Informs participants about the bot (legal requirement)
meeting.sett_pipeline_sub: STT engine and diarization — applies to the next meeting.
meeting.sett_auto_enroll_hint: Create voice profiles for new speakers
meeting.sett_insights_hint: How often the bot inserts AI annotations
meeting.sett_retention_hint: Sessions are removed after this time

live.title: Meeting live
live.diag_empty: Run a capture to see results.
live.diag_error_remote_node: Session is hosted on another mesh node — capture will be available in a later phase
live.leave_confirm_body: The bot will disconnect from the meeting. Transcription and summarization will stop.
live.summary_pending_backend: No summary yet (waiting for first cycle)
live.vnc_unavailable: VNC preview unavailable for this session
live.vnc_error_no_port: VNC port not allocated for this session
live.vnc_error_remote_node: Session is hosted on another mesh node — VNC preview will be available in phase B

wizard.title: Deploying engine
wizard.noPresets: No recommended models — use HuggingFace search
wizard.presetHint: Select a recommended model for this engine
wizard.hfSearchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search
wizard.noMethodsAvailable: No deployment methods available for platform {os}.
wizard.noNodesAvailable: No real deployment target is available. Wait for mesh node discovery or reopen the catalog.

method.externalDesc: Connects to an already running installation

wizard.gpu_subtitle: Choose which GPUs this deployment will use on the selected node.
wizard.gpu_mode_all_hint: Expose every visible GPU to the container.
wizard.gpu_mode_specific_hint: Only the selected GPU indices will be passed through.
wizard.gpu_mode_none_hint: Container runs on CPU; no GPU resources will be requested.
wizard.gpu_empty_on_node: This node has no GPUs visible.
wizard.gpu_select_at_least_one: Select at least one GPU or choose a different mode.
wizard.gpu_summary_all: Will use all GPUs on the node
wizard.gpu_mode_all_desc: Deployment gets full access to every GPU on the selected node.
wizard.gpu_mode_specific_desc: Choose which GPUs to allocate for this deployment.
wizard.gpu_mode_none_desc: Deployment will not touch GPUs — inference runs on CPU.

addon_settings.title: Add-on settings
addon_settings.empty: This add-on does not expose any configuration.

addon_tools.title: Add-on tools
addon_tools.empty: This add-on does not declare any tools.

addon_network.title: Network rules
addon_network.mode_strict_desc: In strict mode only hosts on the allowlist are accepted.
addon_network.mode_permissive_desc: In permissive mode every host is allowed except the blocklist.
addon_network.already_exists: Host is already on the list.
addon_network.declared_subtitle: The addon declares the following network addresses as required for operation. The status shows whether they match your policy.
addon_network.declared_empty: This addon does not declare any network rules in its manifest.
addon_network.admin_policy_subtitle: Manually managed host lists and enforcement mode for this addon.
addon_network.status_missing: Missing from policy — addon will not work in strict mode
addon_network.status_conflicting: Conflicts with policy — will be blocked

addon_uninstall.confirm_body: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}" (v{version})? This action cannot be undone — all add-on data and stored secrets will be permanently removed.

addon_visibility.title: Add-on visibility
addon_visibility.admin_only_hint: When enabled, the add-on is visible exclusively to administrators.
addon_visibility.help_text: Visibility ≠ permissions. A group that sees the add-on still needs specific functional permissions (Permissions tab) to actually do anything with it. A group without visibility will not see the add-on in any listings.
addon_visibility.section_groups_subtitle: Select the groups that should see this add-on in their catalog and be able to use it in workflows.
addon_visibility.admin_only_desc: Hides the add-on from every user except Administrators (overrides the group selection above).
addon_visibility.show_in_catalog_desc: Users can request access to this add-on themselves (sends a request to the admin).

addon_permissions.title: Permissions
addon_permissions.catalog_empty: This add-on does not declare any permissions.
addon_permissions.resolution_order: admin bypass → deny (user) → allow (user) → deny (group) → allow (group) → default. First match wins.
addon_permissions.matrix_subtitle: Columns = permissions declared in the add-on manifest. Rows = user groups. Click a cell to toggle allow / deny / inherit.
addon_permissions.per_user_subtitle: User-level overrides win over group settings. Use only when strictly necessary.
addon_permissions.per_user_empty: No user overrides — use the search above to add one.
addon_permissions.default_row_meta: applied when the group value is inherit

per_user.empty: No user-level overrides. Pick a user above to add one.

default.title: Default permissions (fallback)
default.description: Applied when neither the user nor any of their groups has an explicit grant.

addon_oauth.title: OAuth configuration
addon_oauth.no_providers: This add-on does not declare any OAuth providers.
addon_oauth.mode_required: Select an OAuth mode before saving.
addon_oauth.mode_switch_warning: Mode change affects {n} active connections. Switching from individual to global will disconnect all user tokens. Switching from global to individual will remove the shared account and force every user to reconnect.

mode_desc.global: One shared account for all users.
mode_desc.individual: Each user connects their own account.

addon_oauth.explainer: Configure OAuth credentials for this addon and choose the authentication mode.
addon_oauth.mode_subtitle: Choose how users connect external accounts through this addon.
addon_oauth.mode_global_desc: One shared account linked by the admin. All addon users share the same external account.
addon_oauth.mode_global_hint: Use when: service bots, shared dashboards, team-wide calendars.
addon_oauth.mode_individual_desc: Every user links their own OAuth account. Data and permissions are isolated per user.
addon_oauth.mode_individual_hint: Use when: users act under their own identity (mail, chat, private docs).
addon_oauth.disable_oauth: Disable OAuth for this provider (none mode)
addon_oauth.credentials_subtitle: Client identifiers registered with the OAuth provider. The secret is encrypted and never leaves the server in plaintext.
addon_oauth.provider_desc: OAuth provider declared in the addon manifest — cannot be changed.
addon_oauth.client_id_desc: Public application identifier from the provider console.
addon_oauth.client_secret_desc: Confidential application secret. Stored encrypted — use "Change" to overwrite.
addon_oauth.scopes_desc: Declared by the addon, admin cannot change.
addon_oauth.redirect_uri_desc: Callback URL registered with the provider — read-only.
addon_oauth.clear_secret_confirm_body: Delete the stored client_secret? Users will not be able to authorize until you enter a new secret.
addon_oauth.test_not_configured: Configure the provider first (missing client_id / secret).
addon_oauth.info_individual: In individual mode each user owns a private OAuth token. Tokens are stored encrypted per user and never shared across accounts. Revoking one account by the admin does not affect other users.
addon_oauth.info_global: In global mode a single OAuth token is used by all addon users. Only the admin can link or change the shared account.
addon_oauth.info_disabled: OAuth is disabled for this provider. The addon will not be able to perform actions that require external authorization.
addon_oauth.linked_revoke_confirm_body: Revoke the OAuth token for {email}? This cannot be undone — the user will have to reconnect.
addon_oauth.linked_revoke_all_confirm_body: Unlink every OAuth account for this addon? Irreversible — users will have to reconnect their accounts.
addon_oauth.linked_empty: No linked accounts for this addon

my_accounts.title: My connected accounts
my_accounts.subtitle: External accounts you use in add-ons · {n} active connections
my_accounts.alert_explainer: What are connected accounts? Some add-ons (e.g. Teams, Google Calendar) act on your behalf — they need your personal OAuth token. Manage these connections here. You can disconnect any of them at any time.
my_accounts.empty_state: None of the add-ons available to you require a personal OAuth account.
my_accounts.not_connected_hint: You haven't connected a {provider} account yet. Click to authorize and start using this add-on.
my_accounts.disconnect_confirm_body: Really disconnect {email}? The add-on will stop working on your behalf.

apps_home.subtitle: What would you like to do today?

pose.name: Pose
pose.desc: Camera preview with body skeleton overlay

coming_soon.heading: Not yet available
coming_soon.images: The image generation app requires an image-gen engine (e.g. Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI). Ask your administrator to deploy one from the Service Catalog.
coming_soon.notes: Voice notes require an STT engine (e.g. Whisper) and backend wiring for note storage. Tracked on the roadmap.
coming_soon.meeting: Meeting Bot requires the teams-bot addon with OAuth configured, plus a backend binary handler for transcripts. Tracked on the roadmap.
coming_soon.tts: Text-to-Speech requires a deployed TTS engine and a synthesize binary handler. The TTS rules admin already exists; the user-facing synthesize flow is tracked on the roadmap.
coming_soon.translate: Translate will reuse the chat LLM backend once a dedicated user-facing handler is wired. Tracked on the roadmap.
coming_soon.search: Search across your data is on the roadmap.
coming_soon.mesh_user: A user-facing mesh status view is on the roadmap. Admins can view mesh state under Core → Mesh.
coming_soon.tailscale: User-facing Tailscale status is on the roadmap.

settings_user.title: Settings
settings_user.subtitle: Your personal preferences
settings_user.language_hint: Changes apply immediately and are remembered on this device.

translate.subtitle: Translate text between languages using a local LLM

notes.subtitle: Quick personal notes
notes.empty_state: No notes yet. Click 'New note' to create one.
notes.empty_editor: Select a note or create a new one.
notes.delete_confirm_body: This note will be removed permanently.

connection.title: Connection to server lost
connection.heading: Daemon is not responding
connection.description: The TentaFlow server stopped responding. We're trying to reconnect — do not close this tab.
